selection_rule: Includes top-level packages from the uploaded tree that contain at least one MODFLOW name file matching *.nam or *.NAM. Each model directory is the parent directory of a discovered name file. Package folder values have been expanded to absolute paths under source_tree_root. Boundary boxes are WGS84 rectangular envelopes added for map/search metadata.

boundary_sources.notes: ArcGIS FeatureServer layer for major aquifers; layer supports JSON/geoJSON query formats and includes AQ_NAME field.
TWDB Minor Aquifers shapefile zip; TWDB describes minor aquifers as the 22 minor aquifers of Texas, updated December 2017.
No single statewide aquifer polygon match was assigned from the two provided sources; bbox is a model-area approximation from the package/model name.

geojson_storage_note: boundary_bbox_geojson and dataset_spatial are compact GeoJSON Polygon strings, not nested JSON objects.
